name: Chocolate Bavarian Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crushed wafers and butter together and pat into a buttered 8 x 11-inch cake pan. Chill.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water and set aside.
3. In the top of a double boiler, combine egg yolks, sugar, salt, and scalded milk. Add custard to gelatin mixture and cool.
4. Fold stiffly beaten egg whites, whipped cream, and vanilla into the gelatin-custard mixture.
5. Pour into crust. Garnish with additional cookie crumbs if desired.
6. Chill for several hours before serving.
